Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nye Eldest]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — An elder Nye exists who appears aged, with a worn and faded outer robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The old Nye has the ability to know information like Simon's father's name without being told.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Nye Eldest can produce a blue-white cloud of light from his hood.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Nye Eldest once gave Simon a black box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Eldest Nye is a member of the Nye family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The Eldest Nye said he won't attune the mask.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — The Eldest Nye restored an Incarnation's body to Valinhall and made him an extension of the Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — The Eldest Nye claims to still have a task for the person he restored.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
